candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Direct reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line; preferred over cash and bank balances and over combined cash plus short-term investments.
Common cash line and matches cash flow closing balance, but less precise than explicit cash and cash equivalents.
Includes short-term investments, so broader than CHE and not preferred.
Restricted cash should not be used for CHE.

variables.notes: Prioritized the explicit 'Cash and cash equivalents' label; included 'Cash and bank balances' as secondary because labels may vary by year and values align.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Component only, not the total current liabilities target.

variables.notes: Direct reported total current liabilities line.
No clear non-lease short-term debt/current borrowings line is present. Current lease liabilities and capital lease maturities are excluded by rule; other current liability lines are not debt.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: Direct reported current tax liability line.

candidates.why: Best available balance-sheet line representing property, plant and equipment on a net basis.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease/ROU gross asset line, not preferred for baseline PPE and not a total net PPE measure.

variables.notes: Selected the reported net tangible fixed assets line as the best PPE proxy; no cleaner total PPE net label appears.

candidates.row_label: Cash flw from operations INVESTING ACTIVITIES
candidates.why: Despite the concatenated label, the values equal operating cash flow subtotal and it sits immediately before investing activities.

candidates.row_label: Cash flw from operations before changes in working capital Changes in working capital
candidates.why: This is operating cash flow before working-capital changes, not final operating cash flow.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flw from operations INVESTING ACTIVITIES

variables.notes: Chosen outside shortlist for OANCF from the cash flow sheet. The label is concatenated with the next section heading, but numerically represents net cash from operating activities.
